title: Smart Data Models - FloodMonitoring
description: Flood Sensor Data Model intended to represent the level of flooding w.r.t water flow/level at a certain water mass(river, lake,etc.)..

addressLocality.description: The locality, which must correspond to the municipality

addressRegion.description: The NUTS 2 region in which the locality is located

district.description: The administrative district in which the locality is located

type.description: Property. It has to be FloodMonitoring. NGSI Entity type

alertLevel.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Reference alert level threshold value set for the sensing station corresponding to this observation. An Alert signal is generated if the current level crosses the alert level threshold value

currentLevel.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Current flooding level indicated by the sensing station corresponding to this observation, computed using referenceLevel and measuredDistance(currentLevel = referenceLevel - measuredDistance)

dangerLevel.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Reference danger level threshold value set for the sensing station corresponding to this observation. Flood level status is marked danger if the current level crosses the danger level threshold value

measuredDistance.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Describes the distance measured by the sensor, from the sensor tip to the upper surface of water

referenceLevel.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Describes the vertical distance from river bed to sensor tip

floodLevelStatus.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Flood level status indication given by the flood sensing device. The status is marked Danger if the current level is higher than the danger level threshold value

stationID.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. A unique anonymous identifier assigned to the station corresponding to this observation

observationDateTime.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/DateTime'. Last reported time of observation
